items.title: A lazy ingestion pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR A[chain
merge sources] --> B[filter
drop empties] B --> C[islice / batched
fixed-size chunks] C --> D[embed batch
API call] D --> E[accumulate
running token cost]
items.caption: itertools tools compose into a memory-efficient stream: merge, filter, batch, then process — nothing is fully materialized.
